data.title: 3M Reports First-Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In the first quarter, the company reported GAAP sales totaling $6.0 billion, marking a 1.3% increase from the previous year. The operating margin also saw growth, standing at 23.2%, up 230 basis points year-over-year. However, the earnings per share (EPS) experienced a decline of 40% to reach $1.23. Adjusted sales for the quarter were also $6.0 billion, with a slight organic growth of 1.2% compared to the same period last year. The adjusted operating margin increased to 23.8%, up by 30 basis points year-over-year. Adjusted EPS showed a positive trend, reaching $2.14, reflecting a 14% increase year-over-year. The company reported an operating cash flow of $0.6 billion for the first quarter.

data.title: Medality Named 2026 RAD Honors Health Equity Advocate Award Winner by the Radiology Business Management Association (RBMA)
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on April 21, 2026, Medality, a TrueLearn subsidiary, was granted the 2026 RAD Honors Health Equity Advocate Award by the Radiology Business Management Association (RBMA). This accolade acknowledges entities that have demonstrated a tangible contribution to decreasing health disparities. This recognition highlights Medality's commitment to promoting fairness in healthcare.

data.title: Hyperscale Data Exceeds $50 Million in Bitcoin Holdings for Second Time, Surpassing Halfway Mark Toward $100 Million Bitcoin Treasury Goal
data.description: Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS) is currently in possession of around 663.3130 Bitcoin. The company is actively working to increase its Bitcoin holdings by engaging in mining activities and purchasing more Bitcoin through open-market transactions. This information was disclosed in Las Vegas on April 21, 2026. Hyperscale Data, Inc. operates as an artificial intelligence ("AI") data center.

data.title: Equifax Delivers Record First Quarter Revenue - $37 Million Above Midpoint of February Guidance
data.description: Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) recently revealed its financial performance for the quarter concluded on March 31, 2026. The first quarter saw a noteworthy rise in revenue, reaching $1.649 billion, marking a robust 14% increase. The revenue growth, when adjusted for local currency, was at 13%. This exceeded expectations by $37 million, surpassing the midpoint forecasted back in February.

data.title: Blue Energy Raises $380M to Build World's First Project-Financeable Nuclear Plant
data.description: A company is working on creating prefabricated nuclear power plants that are designed to be deployed faster and more predictably. The financing for this project was primarily provided by VXI Capital, with strong support from Engine Ventures. Other existing investors such as At One Ventures and Tamarack Global also participated in the funding round. data.title: Magnet Defense and Hanwha Defense USA Formalize MUSV Strategic Partnership
data.description: Recently, a collaboration was revealed between Magnet Defense LLC and Hanwha Defense USA (HDUSA) to manufacture Medium Unmanned Surface Vessels (MUSVs) for the U.S. Department of War. This partnership is aimed at enhancing rapid global response capabilities. The news was disclosed on Monday in Miami. The vessels are designed to provide swift deployment for military operations and emergencies. This initiative signifies a step forward in defense technology, as these vessels are expected to play a crucial role in addressing strategic needs. The collaboration between Magnet Defense LLC and HDUSA is a significant development in the defense sector. The partnership will result in the production of advanced naval vessels equipped for swift and effective responses. This venture underscores the importance of innovation and cooperation in meeting the evolving demands of national security.

data.title: Flagship Pioneering Launches Serif Biomedicines to Establish Modified DNA as a New Biotechnology
data.description: Serif is blazing a trail in the field of Modified DNA medicines after Flagship's success with generative protein and mRNA platforms. The company is set to showcase promising data at an upcoming scientific meeting, highlighting the tolerability of their innovations in non-human primates. This development marks a significant step forward in programming the fundamental information layer of biology. Stay tuned for more updates on this groundbreaking research.

data.title: Data Center Market Size Projected to Reach USD 517.17 Billion by 2030, at a CAGR 10.5% | Allied Market Research
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, a report published on April 21, 2026 provides a comprehensive analysis of the global data center market. The report examines the factors that are fueling the growth of the market, its segmentation, regional dynamics, and the competitive landscape. It also highlights the trends that are reshaping the industry. This analysis aims to offer valuable insights into the global data center market for stakeholders.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Intuitive Surgical Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ: ISRG) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on Tuesday, April 21, after the market closes. Analysts anticipate the Sunnyvale, California-based company to reveal earnings of $2.11 per share, up from $1.81 per share a year ago. The consensus forecast for Intuitive Surgical's quarterly revenue stands at $2.62 billion, an increase from $2.25 billion reported last year. Recently, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) raised concerns about potential high-risk issues with stapling devices made by Intuitive Surgical. Following this news, the company's shares declined by 0.8% to $465.60 at Monday's close. For additional insights, readers can explore the latest analyst ratings on Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page, where they can filter by various criteria such as stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, or rating changes.
